designers.title: Designers
designers.text: Meet the big names that work alongside us and explore their creations.

about.title: Tumar
about.text: Tumar has been operating in the furniture market since 1992, becoming a quality reference in the segment and, in this way, gaining a lot of credibility with its customers.

about.title: Tumar
about.subtitle:
A perfect blend of 
 quality and design.
about.text: The passion for producing furniture with quality has always been present at Tumar since its foundation in 1992. Founded in Serra Gaúcha, a region colonized by Italians,where doing well is something strongly rooted in the local culture, Tumar has been growing rapidly thanks to this way of thinking and working.
about.text2: In constant evolution, Tumar gradually realized that its public wanted more than quality products. The clients also wanted beauty, functionality and differentiation. Basically, they wanted design.
about.text3: For this reason, Tumar has been improving and investing both in the technology and peoples talent and creativity, developing products with its internal design studio or in partnership with renowned Brazilian designers.
about.text4: Today Tumar is a recognized brand that delivers quality and design products to the increasingly exigent universe of Brazilian decoration.
about.text5: Tumar is very proud of its trajectory so far, made with a lot of work, investments and always vision for the future.

contact.title: contact
contact.text: To learn more about our products, request information or send suggestions, fill out the form. Our team is always ready to serve you.
